apple.clue: common round fruit that can be red, green, or yellow

banana.clue: long yellow fruit with a peel

orange.clue: citrus fruit with a tough skin and juicy segments

grape.clue: small round fruit that grows in bunches

pear.clue: sweet fruit that is typically narrow at the stem

peach.clue: fuzzy-skinned fruit with a large pit

melon.clue: large fleshy fruit with many seeds

cherry.clue: small round red fruit with a stone

mango.clue: tropical fruit with smooth skin and sweet orange flesh

papaya.clue: tropical fruit with orange flesh and many black seeds

guava.clue: tropical fruit with a pink or white center and small seeds

coconut.clue: large brown nut with a hard shell and white flesh

apricot.clue: small orange-colored fruit similar to a peach

blackberry.clue: small dark purple or black berry

cranberry.clue: sour red berry often used in sauce

lychee.clue: small fruit with a rough red skin and sweet white flesh

nectarine.clue: type of peach with a smooth skin

olive.clue: small oval fruit used to make oil

pineapple.clue: large tropical fruit with a spiky skin

pomegranate.clue: round red fruit with many small seeds inside

raspberry.clue: small red berry with a hollow center

strawberry.clue: red heart-shaped berry with seeds on the outside

watermelon.clue: large green fruit with sweet red flesh and many seeds

cantaloupe.clue: melon with orange flesh and a textured skin

fig.clue: sweet fruit with many small seeds

date.clue: sweet brown fruit of the palm tree

kiwi.clue: small brown fuzzy fruit with green flesh

grapefruit.clue: large citrus fruit with a bitter taste

persimmon.clue: orange-red fruit that looks like a tomato

quince.clue: hard yellow fruit used for jam

elderberry.clue: small dark berry used in syrups

mulberry.clue: small berry that grows on a tree

boysenberry.clue: large dark berry that is a cross between several others

gooseberry.clue: small green or red tart berry

currant.clue: small dried grape or a small tart berry

passionfruit.clue: tropical fruit with a tough skin and seedy center

dragonfruit.clue: tropical fruit with pink skin and white or red flesh with black seeds

starfruit.clue: fruit that looks like a star when sliced

jackfruit.clue: very large tropical fruit with a sweet taste

durian.clue: spiky tropical fruit known for its strong smell

rambutan.clue: red hairy fruit with sweet white flesh

tamarind.clue: brown pod-like fruit with a sour pulp

plantain.clue: type of banana that is usually cooked

kumquat.clue: tiny citrus fruit eaten with the skin

huckleberry.clue: small wild berry similar to a blueberry

loganberry.clue: cross between a raspberry and a blackberry

pawpaw.clue: large yellowish-green fruit with sweet creamy flesh

tamarillo.clue: egg-shaped fruit also known as a tree tomato

soursop.clue: large prickly green fruit with creamy white flesh

breadfruit.clue: large tropical fruit that smells like baked bread when cooked

cherimoya.clue: tropical fruit with a scaly skin and sweet white flesh

jabuticaba.clue: Brazilian fruit that grows directly on the tree trunk

longan.clue: small tropical fruit similar to a lychee

mangosteen.clue: tropical fruit with a thick purple rind and sweet white segments

physalis.clue: small orange fruit enclosed in a papery husk

tangelo.clue: cross between a tangerine and a grapefruit

cloudberry.clue: amber-colored wild berry from the arctic

noni.clue: tropical fruit known for its health benefits

calamansi.clue: small citrus hybrid used in Southeast Asian cuisine

feijoa.clue: small green fruit also known as pineapple guava

jujube.clue: small red fruit known as a Chinese date

medlar.clue: small brown fruit that is eaten when overripe

rowan.clue: small red berry from the mountain ash tree

sloe.clue: small bitter blue-black fruit of the blackthorn
